options.content:
- **Use Cases**: This dashboard shows code coverage metrics from Codecov organized by flags (test types).
- **Data Source Required**: Codecov
- **Metrics**: Overall Coverage (per flag), Lines Coverage (per flag), and Patch Coverage (repository-wide)
- **Multi-Repo**: Select multiple repositories or "All" to see aggregated metrics (average coverage %, summed line counts) and per-repo trend comparison.
- **Patch Coverage**: Shows how well changed code is tested. Calculated by Codecov from actual git diffs. Note: Patch coverage is the same for all flags as it measures repository-wide coverage of changed code.

panels.description: Average code coverage percentage across selected repositories for the selected test type (flag). When a single repo is selected, shows that repo's latest coverage.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(AVG(latest_coverage), 2) as value
FROM (
  SELECT t.repo_id, t.coverage_percentage as latest_coverage
  FROM _tool_codecov_coverage_trends t
  INNER JOIN project_mapping pm ON t.repo_id = pm.row_id AND pm.table = '_tool_codecov_repos'
  WHERE pm.project_name = '${project}'
    AND t.repo_id IN (${repo_id})
    AND t.flag_name = '${flag_name}'
    AND t.date = (
      SELECT MAX(t2.date) FROM _tool_codecov_coverage_trends t2
      WHERE t2.repo_id = t.repo_id AND t2.flag_name = t.flag_name
    )
) per_repo

panels.title: Overall Coverage

panels.description: Total number of lines of code tracked across selected repositories for the selected test type (flag)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(latest_total), 0) as value
FROM (
  SELECT c.lines_total as latest_total
  FROM _tool_codecov_coverages c
  INNER JOIN project_mapping pm ON c.repo_id = pm.row_id AND pm.table = '_tool_codecov_repos'
  WHERE pm.project_name = '${project}'
    AND c.repo_id IN (${repo_id})
    AND c.flag_name = '${flag_name}'
    AND c.lines_total > 0
    AND c.commit_timestamp = (
      SELECT MAX(c2.commit_timestamp) FROM _tool_codecov_coverages c2
      WHERE c2.repo_id = c.repo_id AND c2.flag_name = c.flag_name AND c2.lines_total > 0
    )
) per_repo

panels.title: Total Lines

panels.description: Number of lines covered across selected repositories for the selected test type (flag)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(latest_covered), 0) as value
FROM (
  SELECT c.lines_covered as latest_covered
  FROM _tool_codecov_coverages c
  INNER JOIN project_mapping pm ON c.repo_id = pm.row_id AND pm.table = '_tool_codecov_repos'
  WHERE pm.project_name = '${project}'
    AND c.repo_id IN (${repo_id})
    AND c.flag_name = '${flag_name}'
    AND c.lines_total > 0
    AND c.commit_timestamp = (
      SELECT MAX(c2.commit_timestamp) FROM _tool_codecov_coverages c2
      WHERE c2.repo_id = c.repo_id AND c2.flag_name = c.flag_name AND c2.lines_total > 0
    )
) per_repo

panels.title: Lines Covered

panels.description: Number of lines NOT covered across selected repositories for the selected test type (flag). Calculated as: Total Lines - Lines Covered

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(lines_uncovered), 0) as value
FROM (
  SELECT (c.lines_total - c.lines_covered) as lines_uncovered
  FROM _tool_codecov_coverages c
  INNER JOIN project_mapping pm ON c.repo_id = pm.row_id AND pm.table = '_tool_codecov_repos'
  WHERE pm.project_name = '${project}'
    AND c.repo_id IN (${repo_id})
    AND c.flag_name = '${flag_name}'
    AND c.lines_total > 0
    AND c.commit_timestamp = (
      SELECT MAX(c2.commit_timestamp) FROM _tool_codecov_coverages c2
      WHERE c2.repo_id = c.repo_id AND c2.flag_name = c.flag_name AND c2.lines_total > 0
    )
) per_repo

panels.title: Uncovered Lines

panels.description: Historical trend of overall coverage percentage for the selected test type (flag). Shows one line per selected repository for comparison.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(t.date) as time_sec,
  ROUND(t.coverage_percentage, 2) as value,
  t.repo_id as metric
FROM _tool_codecov_coverage_trends t
INNER JOIN project_mapping pm ON t.repo_id = pm.row_id AND pm.table = '_tool_codecov_repos'
WHERE pm.project_name = '${project}'
  AND t.repo_id IN (${repo_id})
  AND t.flag_name = '${flag_name}'
  AND t.date >= DATE($__timeFrom())
  AND t.date <= DATE($__timeTo())
ORDER BY t.date

panels.title: Overall Coverage Trend

panels.description: Average patch coverage across selected repositories. Shows how well changed code is tested. Calculated by Codecov from actual git diffs. Note: Patch coverage is repository-wide (same for all flags).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(AVG(repo_patch), 2) as value
FROM (
  SELECT sub.repo_id, AVG(sub.patch_per_commit) as repo_patch
  FROM (
    SELECT comp.repo_id, comp.commit_sha, MAX(comp.patch) as patch_per_commit
    FROM _tool_codecov_comparisons comp
    INNER JOIN _tool_codecov_commits cm ON comp.connection_id = cm.connection_id AND comp.repo_id = cm.repo_id AND comp.commit_sha = cm.commit_sha
    INNER JOIN project_mapping pm ON comp.repo_id = pm.row_id AND pm.table = '_tool_codecov_repos'
    WHERE pm.project_name = '${project}'
      AND comp.repo_id IN (${repo_id})
      AND comp.patch IS NOT NULL
      AND cm.commit_timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
      AND cm.commit_timestamp <= $__timeTo()
    GROUP BY comp.repo_id, comp.commit_sha
  ) sub
  GROUP BY sub.repo_id
) per_repo

panels.title: Patch Coverage

panels.description: Historical trend of lines covered vs total lines for the selected test type (flag). Shows summed values across all selected repositories. Blue line shows total lines tracked, green line shows lines covered.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(daily.day) as time_sec,
  SUM(daily.lines_covered) as 'Lines Covered',
  SUM(daily.lines_total) as 'Lines Total'
FROM (
  SELECT c.repo_id, DATE(c.commit_timestamp) as day, c.lines_covered, c.lines_total,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.repo_id, DATE(c.commit_timestamp) ORDER BY c.commit_timestamp DESC) as rn
  FROM _tool_codecov_coverages c
  INNER JOIN project_mapping pm ON c.repo_id = pm.row_id AND pm.table = '_tool_codecov_repos'
  WHERE pm.project_name = '${project}'
    AND c.repo_id IN (${repo_id})
    AND c.flag_name = '${flag_name}'
    AND c.lines_total > 0
    AND c.commit_timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
    AND c.commit_timestamp <= $__timeTo()
) daily
WHERE daily.rn = 1
GROUP BY daily.day
ORDER BY time_sec

panels.title: Lines Coverage Trend

panels.description: Daily repository-wide patch coverage from Codecov. Shows one line per selected repository for comparison. Calculated by Codecov from actual git diffs. Days without changes show no data point (gaps are connected).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(sub.day) as time_sec,
  ROUND(AVG(sub.max_patch), 2) as value,
  sub.repo_id as metric
FROM (
  SELECT comp.repo_id, comp.commit_sha, DATE(cm.commit_timestamp) as day, MAX(comp.patch) as max_patch
  FROM _tool_codecov_comparisons comp
  INNER JOIN _tool_codecov_commits cm ON comp.connection_id = cm.connection_id AND comp.repo_id = cm.repo_id AND comp.commit_sha = cm.commit_sha
  INNER JOIN project_mapping pm ON comp.repo_id = pm.row_id AND pm.table = '_tool_codecov_repos'
  WHERE pm.project_name = '${project}'
    AND comp.repo_id IN (${repo_id})
    AND comp.patch IS NOT NULL
    AND cm.commit_timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
    AND cm.commit_timestamp <= $__timeTo()
  GROUP BY comp.repo_id, comp.commit_sha, DATE(cm.commit_timestamp)
) sub
GROUP BY sub.day, sub.repo_id
ORDER BY time_sec

panels.title: Patch Coverage Trend

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT name FROM projects ORDER BY name LIMIT 1
list.label: Project
list.name: project
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT name FROM projects ORDER BY name

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT c.repo_id FROM _tool_codecov_coverages c INNER JOIN project_mapping pm ON c.repo_id = pm.row_id AND pm.table = '_tool_codecov_repos' WHERE pm.project_name = '${project}' ORDER BY c.repo_id LIMIT 1
list.label: Repository
list.name: repo_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT c.repo_id FROM _tool_codecov_coverages c INNER JOIN project_mapping pm ON c.repo_id = pm.row_id AND pm.table = '_tool_codecov_repos' WHERE pm.project_name = '${project}' ORDER BY c.repo_id

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT c.flag_name FROM _tool_codecov_coverages c INNER JOIN project_mapping pm ON c.repo_id = pm.row_id AND pm.table = '_tool_codecov_repos' WHERE pm.project_name = '${project}' AND c.repo_id IN (${repo_id}) AND c.flag_name != '' AND c.flag_name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY c.flag_name LIMIT 1
list.label: Test Name
list.name: flag_name
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT c.flag_name FROM _tool_codecov_coverages c INNER JOIN project_mapping pm ON c.repo_id = pm.row_id AND pm.table = '_tool_codecov_repos' WHERE pm.project_name = '${project}' AND c.repo_id IN (${repo_id}) AND c.flag_name != '' AND c.flag_name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY c.flag_name
